definitions.text: A fourth part of something. Each of four equal parts into which something can be divided; a fourth part. .mw-parser-output .defdate{font-size:smaller}
examples: I ate a quarter of the pizza.

definitions.text: Each of four equal parts into which something can be divided; a fourth part. .mw-parser-output .defdate{font-size:smaller}
examples: I ate a quarter of the pizza.

definitions.text: A measure of capacity used chiefly for grain or coal, varying greatly in quantity by time and location.
Pertaining to an aspect of a quarter.
Consisting of a fourth part, a quarter (⁄4, 25%).
examples: a quarter hour; a quarter century; a quarter note; a quarter pound

definitions.text: Related to a three-month term, a quarter of a year.
examples: A quarter day is one terminating a quarter of the year.
A quarter session is one held quarterly at the end of a quarter.

definitions.text: To divide into quarters; to divide by four.
To provide housing for (usually military personnel or equipment).
examples: Quarter the horses in the third stable.

definitions.text: To lodge; to have a temporary residence.
To drive a carriage so as to prevent the wheels from going into the ruts, or so that a rut shall be between the wheels.
